purpose: Product on dark wooden table with dramatic light beam in old library.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Atmospheric heritage photography of {product_descriptor} on weathered dark wood table in dimly lit old library setting, dramatic single beam of golden light streaming through unseen window catching dust particles, blurred bookshelves with leather-bound volumes in background, vintage globe slightly visible, shot on 50mm at f/4 with shallow depth, no text, no watermark, no people {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: bright modern lighting
notes: Intents: launch, defend. Source code in research corpus: T29. Saudi adaptation guidance: Library can be reinterpreted as traditional Saudi majlis with traditional manuscripts to localize. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per quarter.
